content: - [project_quran_api.md](project_quran_api.md) — Architecture, data sources, key files for quran-api (Hono + Vercel, no QuranWBW)

name: quran_api_architecture
description: Architecture and data sources for the quran-api project (TypeScript Hono API on Vercel)
type: project
---

Quran API is a TypeScript + Hono API deployed on Vercel with no QuranWBW dependency.

**Why:** User explicitly replaced all QuranWBW data sources with open alternatives.

**Data sources (no QuranWBW):**
- QUL (qul.tarteel.ai) — MIT license — primary source for everything
- mustafa0x/quran-morphology — GPL — sub-word POS morphology (corpus.quran.com

name: arch_migration_readingstore
description: Architectural migration status for the Assirat web app — ReadingStore split-brain fix, audio state, SW contract
type: project
---

Phase 1 architectural migration completed (2026-03-27):

1. **ReadingStore.ts** — Added `transliterationSettings`, `quizSettings`, `offlineModeSettings` derived slices.
2. **storesCore.ts** — ~25 settings-backed writable stores replaced with `derived()` projections of `_settings`. UI/ephemeral stores stay writable. `__au
